mapper.select: select * from mw_link order by sequence asc
select * from mw_link where link_id = #{linkId} limit 1
select * from mw_link order by sequence asc, link_id desc
select * from mw_link where name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by sequence asc, link_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into mw_link(name, url, sequence, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{url}, #{sequence}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
